# listing — Basic _(HTML/CSS)_

```css
@forward '@lucca-front/scss/src/components/listing';
```

```html
<ul class="listing">
	<li class="listing-item">
		<div class="listing-item-content">item</div>
	</li>
	<li class="listing-item">
		<div class="listing-item-content">item</div>
	</li>
	<li class="listing-item">
		<div class="listing-item-content">
			item
			<ul class="listing">
				<li class="listing-item">
					<div class="listing-item-content">item</div>
				</li>
				<li class="listing-item">
					<div class="listing-item-content">item</div>
				</li>
				<li class="listing-item">
					<div class="listing-item-content">item</div>
				</li>
			</ul>
		</div>
	</li>
</ul>
```
